nodes.title: Dummy English Class
nodes.content: An introductory course covering fundamental concepts of the English language.

nodes.title: Unit 1: Alphabet
nodes.content: Focuses on the basic components of written English: the alphabet and individual letters.

nodes.title: Alphabet
nodes.content: The complete set of letters used in the English language.

nodes.title: Letter
nodes.content: A fundamental symbol in a writing system, representing a specific sound.

nodes.title: Unit 2: Words
nodes.content: Explores how letters combine to form words and how words combine to form sentences.

nodes.title: Word
nodes.content: A collection of one or more letters arranged to convey a specific meaning.

nodes.title: Sentence
nodes.content: A complete thought or idea expressed as a collection of words, forming a grammatically coherent unit.
